title: Create: Fully Automated
description: More Create Recipes For Even More Automation!
body:
Adds even more recipes so you can automate even more stuff using create!

***New Update!!***
---

***Automated Items Now Include:***

-Netherrack (Haunt andesite)

-Asurine (Mix water with stone while it's heated to make asurine)

-Zinc (Zinc is now fully automated using asurine, simply cook it using a blast furnace)

-Redstone (Wash crushed iron ingot)

-Eggs (Use filled syringe on chicken)

-Obsidian (Mix water and lava with powdered obsidian)

-Bones/Bone meal (Crush bones into crushed bones and wash them to get bonemeal and atleast 1 bone back)

---

***New Items:***

-Crushed Iron Ingot

-Crushed Bones

***New items from the Neoforge update include:***

-Nutritious Jelly (Made from wheat seeds, bone meal, and water.)

-Syringe (Crafted from one glass and two andesite alloys.)

-Filled Syringe (Use spout filled with nutritious jelly on syringe, can be given to chickens to make them drop 1 egg.)
